arts.ttl: FC Barcelona vs Bayern Munich: Gamethread and Live Blog
arts.sum: If Jamal Musiala returns to the lineup, then alongside Harry Kane and Michael Olise, Bayern Munich are able to field the second highest-scoring trio in Europe at the moment. Lately, when Bayern Munich have faced FC Barcelona in the Champions League, it seems like there’s always been a reunion of some sort.

arts.ttl: Xavi is one of Man United's oldest foes who left Sir Alex Ferguson 'dizzy' on the Barcelona 'carousel' in TWO Champions League finals and had Wayne Rooney begging for mercy
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola once told a young Xavi 'you will retire me' at Barcelona. That prophecy could soon be reignited with another layer of meaning.

arts.ttl: Why Kompany managing Bayern is 'not a risk'
arts.sum: Nedum Onuoha discusses how his former Manchester City team-mate Vincent Kompany will lead Bayern Munich in this season's Champions League.

arts.ttl: Barcelona vs Bayern Munich LIVE! Champions League match stream, latest team news, lineups, TV, prediction
arts.sum: Hansi Flick looking for revenge against former club

arts.sum: Former Real Madrid star Toni Kroos has revealed his prediction for the outcome of the upcoming showdown between Barcelona and Bayern Munich. Barca and Bayern, of course, are primed to…

arts.ttl: Injured Real Madrid star to return to squad for Barcelona clash
arts.sum: Real Madrid are expected to have an important member of the club’s attacking ranks back available for their upcoming showdown with arch rivals Barcelona. That’s according to Real insider Mario…

arts.ttl: Will Bayern Munich vs. FC Barcelona live up to the hype?
arts.sum: Bayern Munich has been mostly good (in fairness, what team doesn’t have flaws at this stage), while FC Barcelona looks completely rejuvenated under Hansi Flick, but has yet to snare a signature win under Flick (at least as of now). With the constellation of stars on each team and high-profile managers, will it all come together for the kind of exciting match that fans want?

arts.ttl: Robbed! Bayern Munich employee held up in Barcelona ahead of Champions League tilt
arts.sum: According to a report from Sky Sport journalist Kerry Hau that was confirmed by the club, a Bayern Munich employee was robbed on the street in Barcelona on Tuesday night. When asked by Sky, FC Bayern confirmed that a club employee was robbed on the street in Barcelona on Tuesday evening.
